name: Product list page
description: A product list page with personalized content regions.

region_definitions.name: Top Full Width Region
region_definitions.description: Full screen width region at the top of search results

region_definitions.name: Top Content Region
region_definitions.description: Content width region below sort/filter, above product grid

region_definitions.name: Bottom Region
region_definitions.description: Region at the bottom of search results after product grid

attribute_definitions.name: Category
attribute_definitions.description: The category to show the product list page for.
